LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANTS NIESAR & WHYTE LLP, FORMERLY KNOWN AS NIESAR CURLS BARTLING LLP (N&W) GERALD V. NIESAR AND ROBERT O. WHYTE'S PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION IS DENIED. CROSS-DEFENDANT HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANT AGREED TO ARBITRATE DISPUTES. IN ANY EVENT, THE COURT WOULD NOT ORDER ARBITRATION BECAUSE CROSS-COMPLAINANT HAS CLAIMS AGAINST MR. HOTZ ARISING OUT OF THE SAME TRANSACTIONS AND RAISING COMMON ISSUES OF LAW AND FACT THAT COULD GIVE RISE TO CONFLICTING RULINGS ON THOSE ISSUES. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Ntc Of Hearing On X-Defts Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL J. RICHERT, TEL. NO. 277-5957 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT PEGGY KNIGHT SOLUTIONS INCORPORATED;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANTS NIESAR & WHYTE L L P, formerly known as NIESAR CURLS BARTLING LLP (N&W) GERALD V. NIESAR AND ROBERT O. WHYTE'S Hearing On Cross-Defendant's Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration IS DENIED. CROSS-DEFENDANT HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANT AGREED TO ARBITRATE DISPUTES. IN ANY EVENT, THE COURT WOULD NOT ORDER ARBITRATION BECAUSE CROSS- COMPLAINANT HAS CLAIMS AGAINST MR. HOTZ ARISING OUT OF THE SAME TRANSACTIONS AND RAISING COMMON ISSUES OF LAW AND FACT THAT COULD GIVE RISE TO CONFLICTING RULINGS ON THOSE ISSUES. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
